name: manga-viewer
description: A responsive manga viewer with touch gestures and zoom support

scripts.build: npm run lint && tailwindcss -i ./src/input.css -o ./dist/output.css --minify && node scripts/build.js
scripts.build:prod: npm run lint && NODE_ENV=production tailwindcss -i ./src/input.css -o ./dist/output.css --minify && node scripts/build.js
